data.name: HELP! My New Roommate is a Hung Goth Futanari Ghost !
data.detailed_description:
"HELP! My New Roommate is a Hung Goth Futanari Ghost!" is a sexy, spooky, and side-splitting visual novel that blends romantic comedy with a touch of horror—and a lot of ghost dong.

You’ve just moved into your college dorm, but something’s... off. The Girls cant stop throwing themselves at you. And your new roommate? She’s a sarcastic, sultry goth ghost with a surprising amount of unfinished business (and let’s just say she’s packing).

You Dick Might be big, But the Futa's here put your Package to shame, and they will let you know how pittifull your penis is compared to theirs. 

Get ready for a paranormal love story filled with ridiculous misunderstandings, steamy supernatural moments, and genuinely heartfelt bonding. Will you survive the hauntings, navigate the chaos of cohabitating with the hung undead, and maybe—just maybe—fall in love?

Features:

  • 👻 A linear, story-rich experience packed with absurdist humor and spicy romance

  • 🖤 One unforgettable goth futanari ghost with charm, trauma, and too much eyeliner

  • 💌 Cute and heartfelt moments mixed with the truly unhinged

  • 🏠 A haunted dorm room full of secrets, awkwardness, and sexual tension

  • 🔥 Mature content handled with comedic flair and unapologetic weirdness

  • 📚 ~2–3 hours of gameplay with custom art, music, and dialogue you’ll never forget

This game is for adults only and features explicit content with a healthy dose of comedy, camp, and chaos. If you like gothic babes, horny ghosts, and stories that don't take themselves too seriously, this one's for you.

data.short_description: The housing market sucks, and the only place you could afford is a dorm haunted by a Goth, Hung Futa Ghost. I hope your down for some restless nights, because it's not just the Ghosts in this apartment that want a piece of you, and most of the girls are packing more than you expect.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10,11
  • 處理器: Intel I5 4th gen or later
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics 8th gen or later
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10,11
  • 處理器: Intel I5 8th gen or later
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10,11
  • Processor: Intel I5 4th gen or later
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated Graphics 8th gen or later
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10,11
  • Processor: Intel I5 8th gen or later
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated Graphics
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
